summary: DHH announces 37signals' first paid research report evaluating 25 e-commerce search engines, priced at $99. He notes it follows their earlier free brief 'Sites that Don't Click.' He highlights his own contribution to building the buying experience and custom cover generation system for the report.
key_points: 37signals transitioned from free research briefs to paid reports as a revenue model
The report evaluated 25 e-commerce search engines, reflecting 37signals' early focus on web usability research
DHH personally built the e-commerce and custom cover generation system for selling the report
money_quotes: It's a wonderful, solid, and insightful report that can be yours for just $99.
The buying experience and custom cover generation was developed by yours truely.
key_insight: This early 37signals post captures the company's origins as a web usability consultancy selling research reports, with DHH building the infrastructure to support their nascent product business.
